task: Add a local durable event-store and run event replay slice for the Pro Rust product core: add a Rust event-store crate backed by a local JSON file, append seed/create-run events from the Pro API, expose read-only event-log and replay endpoints for runs, render a compact event replay panel in the graph-first web shell, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Keep this local-only and keyless: do not add Postgres/Redis, hosted auth, workers, provider execution, credential access, quota/billing mutation, OSS runtime changes, npm dependencies, or live provider calls.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
